patch.value: Extract calendar UX into installable pm package
Move calendar/cal presentation, reminders/events rendering, recurrence expansion, and schedule presets toward a pm-calendar package while keeping deadline metadata and item primitives in core.

pm-calendar package owns optional calendar UX; core keeps item deadline fields; contracts/MCP expose calendar commands only when package installed or during compatibility fallback; temp-project dogfood covers installed package behavior.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-05-14: pm search calendar package extraction found only closed calendar feature/issue work plus parent pm-59gj; net-new extraction child under pm-59gj.
